title.en: The Chanukah Menorah: Exact Placement, Timing, and Procedure
title.zh: 光明节烛台：精确放置、时机和程序
title.he: חנוכיית חנוכה: מיקום מדויק, תזמון ונוהל

description.en: Detailed halachic guide to menorah lighting — where to place it, when to light, how many candles each night, and the blessings.
description.zh: 光明节烛台点燃的详细犹太律法指南——放置位置、点燃时间、每晚蜡烛数量和祝福词。
description.he: מדריך הלכתי מפורט להדלקת חנוכיה — איפה למקם אותה, מתי להדליק, כמה נרות בכל לילה, והברכות.

author: Torah Light Editorial Team

headerImage.description: A beautiful brass Chanukah menorah with nine branches against a warm evening background, with eight oil-filled glass cups and one elevated shamash candle. The menorah sits near a frost-covered window overlooking a quiet street with soft golden lamplight visible outside, capturing the essence of bringing light into winter darkness.
headerImage.alt: Chanukah menorah with nine branches placed near window for public viewing
headerImage.caption: The Chanukah menorah: A beacon of religious freedom and divine providence

seoDescription: Complete halachic guide to Chanukah menorah lighting: proper placement, timing, blessings, and procedures for each night of Hanukkah.
